metadata.description: Command-aware semantic compression of agent tool output via PreToolUse command-wrap plus best-effort PostToolUse rewrite.

plugins.name: semtrim
plugins.description: Replaces blind head+tail truncation with Boost-derived, command-aware compression. PreToolUse command-wrap is the reliable path (PostToolUse output replacement is unreliable for Bash on current Claude Code); data-driven filters for npm/pnpm/pip/docker/go/cargo/tsc/next/vitest/jest/pytest/git/linters plus a generic fallback and secret redaction. Deterministic and cache-safe; never blocks.
